name: 萧振祥
current_positions: Senior Minister of State for Finance
Member of Parliament (Brickland-Tengah, Chua Chu Kang GRC)

education.field: Economics and Urban Planning (BA, BS) - PSC Scholarship

work_experience.position: Principal Private Secretary to PM Lee Hsien Loong

work_experience.organization: Ministry of Manpower / Ministry of Trade and Industry

work_experience.position: Senior Minister of State for Finance

person_relationships.description: Served as Principal Private Secretary to PM Lee Hsien Loong from 2017 to 2021
Succeeded Chee Hong Tat as Acting Minister for Transport when Chee moved to National Development
Contested Chua Chu Kang GRC together in GE2025 alongside Tan See Leng
Originally part of Gan Kim Yong's team for Chua Chu Kang GRC before Gan was transferred to Punggol GRC

family_members.industry_or_organization: Married with one son and one daughter

political_stances.stance_content: Outlined vision for Singapore transport, emphasizing direction-setting and pace of achieving transport goals; also focusing on recruiting local bus drivers while balancing operational needs
Described politics as 'an extension of public service' and said it was 'time to take a different tack' after 24 years in civil service
political_stances.source: The Straits Times / The Business Times

major_achievements.achievement: As Director at MOT, oversaw Bus Contracting Model, planned Thomson-East Coast MRT line, and worked on Kuala Lumpur-Singapore high-speed rail and Johor Bahru-Singapore Rapid Transit System projects
Served as first Managing Director and COO of Enterprise Singapore
Appointed Second Permanent Secretary at Ministry of Manpower, later concurrently at Ministry of Trade and Industry
Most senior civil servant to resign for politics ahead of GE2025; immediately appointed Acting Minister for Transport in first electoral term
Won Chua Chu Kang GRC with 63.59% of the vote against Progress Singapore Party

biography_summary: Jeffrey Siow Chen Siang (born 1978) is a Singaporean politician and former civil servant who has served as Acting Minister for Transport and Senior Minister of State for Finance since May 2025. He grew up in a one-room HDB rental flat in Henderson and earned a PSC scholarship to Cornell University (BA Economics, BS Urban Planning) and an MBA from MIT Sloan. He spent 24 years in the civil service across multiple agencies: Civil Service College, MOE, MOT (where he oversaw major transport projects including Bus Contracting Model and Thomson-East Coast MRT line), and served as Principal Private Secretary to PM Lee Hsien Loong (2017-2021). He was the first MD/COO of Enterprise Singapore and rose to Second Permanent Secretary at MOM and MTI before resigning as the most senior civil servant to enter politics for GE2025. He won Chua Chu Kang GRC with 63.59% of the vote.

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with full civil service career timeline (24 years across 6 agencies), education details (Cornell BA/BS + MIT MBA), MOT achievements (Bus Contracting Model, Thomson-East Coast MRT, HSR), PPS to PM Lee role, Enterprise Singapore founding, GE2025 results. Added relationships with Lee Hsien Loong, Chee Hong Tat, Gan Kim Yong, Tan See Leng.
